title: Senior Financial Analyst - BSE - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - BSE - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
BSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About BSE:
BSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
